heading: Special pay: nuclear career annual incentive bonus

(A) to (D) for provision that the annual bonus be reduced pro rata each day of a nuclear service year that an officer was not on active duty; was not qualified for duty in connection with the supervision, operation, and maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants; was performing obligated service as the result of an active-service agreement executed under ; or was entitled to receive aviation career incentive pay in accordance with ; and struck out fourth sentence relating to conditions authorizing a further pro rata reduction in the amount of the annual bonus in the case of an officer with more than ten, but not more than eighteen, years of commissioned service, an officer with more than eighteen, but not more than twenty-five, years of commissioned service, and an officer with more than twenty-five, but not more than twenty-six, years of commissioned service.Pub. children.label: A
children.text: is entitled to basic pay;

children.label: B
children.text: is not above the pay grade O–6;

children.label: C
children.text: has completed his initial obligated active service as an officer;

children.label: D
children.text: has, as a commissioned officer, successfully completed training for duty in connection with the supervision, operation, and maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants; and

children.label: E
children.text: has the current technical qualifications for duty in connection with the supervision, operation, and maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants;

In order to be eligible for an annual bonus for any nuclear service year in accordance with this subsection, an otherwise technically qualified officer must have been on active duty on the last day of that nuclear service year.

children.label: A
children.text: was not on active duty;

children.label: B
children.text: was not technically qualified for duty in connection with the supervision, operation, and maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants;

children.label: C
children.text: was performing obligated service as the result of an active-service agreement executed under ; orsection 312 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: be technically qualified for duty in connection with the supervision, operation, and maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants; and

children.label: ii
children.text: be qualified for the performance of operational flying duties.

children.label: A
children.text: is entitled to basic pay;

children.label: B
children.text: is not above the pay grade O–6;

children.label: C
children.text: has, as an enlisted member, received training for duty in connection with the supervision, operation, and maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants; and

children.label: D
children.text: has the current technical qualifications for duty in connection with the supervision, operation, and maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants;

In order to be eligible for an annual bonus for any nuclear service year in accordance with this subsection, an otherwise technically qualified officer must have been on active duty on the last day of that nuclear service year.

children.label: A
children.text: was not in an assignment involving the direct supervision, operation, or maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants;

children.label: B
children.text: was performing obligated service as the result of an active-service agreement executed under ; orsection 312 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: involving the direct supervision, operation, or maintenance of naval nuclear propulsion plants; and

children.label: ii
children.text: that required the officer be qualified for the performance of operational flying duties.

children.label: c
children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Navy, an officer of the naval service who is not on active duty on the last day of a nuclear service year or who, on or before the last day of a nuclear service year, loses his technical qualifications or advances from the pay grade of O–6 to a higher pay grade may be paid a bonus in accordance with subsection (a) or (b) on a pro rata basis, if otherwise qualified, unless termination of active duty or loss of technical qualifications was voluntary or was the result of his own misconduct.

children.label: d
children.text: For the purposes of this section, a “nuclear service year” is any fiscal year beginning before .December 31, 2018
